Our story

Built by founders,
for founders

StartupVerse was born from frustration. Our founding team spent years navigating fragmented tools, cold LinkedIn DMs, and opaque fundraising processes. We built the platform we always wished existed.

12,400+

Founders

480+

Investors

$2.8B

Raised on platform

94%

Match satisfaction

Our mission

To accelerate the global startup ecosystem by making it dramatically easier for the right founders, investors, co-founders, builders, and advisors to find each other — and build great companies together.

What we believe

Builders first

Everything we build is for founders, co-founders, and builders who are changing the world.

Community over competition

We believe the startup ecosystem grows stronger when great people connect and help each other succeed.

Global & inclusive

Great companies are being built everywhere. StartupVerse is designed for founders across all geographies and backgrounds.

Signal over noise

We curate connections, not collect them. Every feature is designed to drive meaningful relationships.

Our milestones

✓

2024

StartupVerse founded by a team of former founders and VCs

✓

2025 Q1

Beta launch with 500 invited founders

✓

2025 Q2

Passed $500M in deals tracked on the platform

✓

2025 Q4

10,000+ founders, 200+ investors — Series A announced

✓

2026

Global launch: 12,400+ members, $2.8B raised via platform

Join us in building the future

We're just getting started. 12,400+ founders have already found their co-founder, investor, or first hire on StartupVerse.
